markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Laravel Education

A curated list of resources for learning about the Laravel PHP Framework, to help you beginner, intermediate or advanced developer.

Translations

Please select the curated list below to begin your learning of the Laravel PHP Framework!

  • Chinese
  • English
  • Portuguese

How to contribute?

  • Please make an individual pull request for each suggestion
  • New categories or improvements to the existing categorization are welcome

Make a difference

These guys below contributed with content, translations and more. What are you waiting for? Come join us and put yourself down below ;)

  • Laravel 台灣
  • @fukeball
  • @joaosvieira

Develop Tools

  • Sublime Text
    • Alignmentstars510 - Easy alignment of multiple selections and multi-line selections
    • Blade Snippetsstars112 - Provide snippets for blade template engine
    • BracketHighlighterstars1.7k - Bracket and tag highlighter
    • DocBlockrstars3.1k - Simplifies writing DocBlock comments
    • Emmetstars5.3k - Improves HTML & CSS workflow
    • Laravel Blade Highlighterstars396 - Adds syntax definitions for the Laravel 5 Blade engine
    • phpfmt - Plugin to format PHP code - supports also PSR1/2
    • Sidebar Enhancementsstars2.1k - Enhancements to Sublime Text sidebar
    • SublimeCodeIntelstars5k - Full-featured code intelligence and smart autocomplete engine
    • SublimeLinterstars1.9k - Interactive code linting framework, you have to install SublimeLinter-php too for coding in PHP
    • SublimeLinter-phpstars205 - SublimeLinter plugin for PHP
    • Syntax Highlighting for Sassstars294 - Syntax highlighting for both SCSS and Sass
    • Trailing Spacesstars883 - Highlight trailing spaces and delete them
  • PhpStorm IDE
    • Laravel Plugin for PhpStormstars542
